pendingTranslations.Tap the matching pairs as fast as you ca: Tap the matching pairs as fast as you can. Jokers are wild for groups of 3+.
pendingTranslations.Bam 4 is unrelated to the flower/5-crak: Bam 4 is unrelated to the flower/5-crak signal — safer than feeding either.
pendingTranslations.Pung needs one more tile — a joker is OK: Pung needs one more tile — a joker is OK here. Choose any legal completion.
pendingTranslations.Right exposed PUNG of red dragons, PUNG: Right exposed PUNG of red dragons, PUNG of green dragons — Winds & Dragons.
pendingTranslations.Year needs NEWS + digits 2,0,2,5 — bam 6: Year needs NEWS + digits 2,0,2,5 — bam 6 is the only tile not on that list.
pendingTranslations.Across exposed PUNG of 1-craks and PUNG: Across exposed PUNG of 1-craks and PUNG of 3-craks — looks like 13579 craks.
pendingTranslations.Five matched pairs already, all in craks: Five matched pairs already, all in craks — Singles & Pairs is one tile away.
pendingTranslations.Three flowers + full NEWS + year digits: Three flowers + full NEWS + year digits 2,0,2,5 = strong Year hand foundation.

pendingTranslations.Pung of red dragons, pair of greens, and: Pung of red dragons, pair of greens, and full NEWS — classic Winds & Dragons.
pendingTranslations.Which line matches? (pair, pung, kong, k: Which line matches? (pair, pung, kong, kong of consecutive numbers in one suit)
pendingTranslations.You have a single 5-dot, need a pair. Jo: You have a single 5-dot, need a pair. Jokers cannot make pairs. Pick correctly.
pendingTranslations.You have pairs of 5 in all three suits a: You have pairs of 5 in all three suits and 2 jokers — pure Like Numbers fuel.
Right opponent exposed PUNG of 4-craks. Across opponent exposed KONG of flowers.
pendingTranslations.All odd digits 1,3,5,7,9 concentrated in: All odd digits 1,3,5,7,9 concentrated in craks — perfect 13579 single-suit run.
pendingTranslations.Joker is in YOUR own exposed pung. You w: Joker is in YOUR own exposed pung. You want to take it back into your hand. Swap?

pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed KONG of red dragons (jo: Opponent exposed KONG of red dragons (joker inside). You hold a red dragon. Swap?
pendingTranslations.A quick visual lesson covering the essen: A quick visual lesson covering the essentials. Tap through each step at your pace.
pendingTranslations.Every dot tile feeds their 369 hand. Bam: Every dot tile feeds their 369 hand. Bam 8 is the only off-suit, off-pattern tile.
pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed QUINT of 8-dots (with t: Opponent exposed QUINT of 8-dots (with two jokers). You hold one real 8-dot. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Right opponent exposed KONG of 3-dots an: Right opponent exposed KONG of 3-dots and PUNG of 6-dots — building 369 in dots.
pendingTranslations.A \"C\" means the hand must remain conce: A "C" means the hand must remain concealed. An "X" means you may expose with calls.
pendingTranslations.FF + a near-complete quint of 1-bam — po: FF + a near-complete quint of 1-bam — points the way to a high-value Quints hand.
pendingTranslations.FF + multiples of 2, 0, and 5 with joker: FF + multiples of 2, 0, and 5 with jokers — classic Year (FF 2222 0000 ... 5555).
pendingTranslations.Code expires 24 hours after sending. By: Code expires 24 hours after sending. By verifying you confirm ownership of this email.
You have a single 5-dot and need a pair. Jokers cannot make pairs. Pick the legal tile.
pendingTranslations.You have one flower and need a pair. Jok: You have one flower and need a pair. Jokers cannot complete pairs. Pick the legal tile.
pendingTranslations.FF = a pair of flowers. FFFF = a kong of: FF = a pair of flowers. FFFF = a kong of flowers. NEWS = one of each wind, in any order.
pendingTranslations.It is your turn. You hold real 7-crak; a: It is your turn. You hold real 7-crak; an opponent has a joker in pung of 7-craks. Swap?
pendingTranslations.It is NOT your turn. You want to swap a: It is NOT your turn. You want to swap a tile for a joker in an opponent's exposure. Swap?
pendingTranslations.You have four 6-dots and need a fifth fo: You have four 6-dots and need a fifth for a quint. No real 6-dots in pile. Which is LEGAL?
pendingTranslations.Discard within 5 seconds. Name each disc: Discard within 5 seconds. Name each discard. Avoid commentary on others' tiles or strategy.
pendingTranslations.F = Flower · B/C/D = Bam/Crak/Dot · \"J\: F = Flower · B/C/D = Bam/Crak/Dot · "J" means jokers are allowed in that group. Pairs and
pendingTranslations.It is your turn. Opponent exposed KONG o: It is your turn. Opponent exposed KONG of 2-bams using a joker. You hold a real 2-bam. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Opponent claims to have exposed a PAIR o: Opponent claims to have exposed a PAIR of 4-dots using a joker. You hold a real 4-dot. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Same number across all three suits — e.g: Same number across all three suits — e.g., pung of 5-bam + pung of 5-crak + pung of 5-dot.
pendingTranslations.Draw one tile from the wall. Decide what: Draw one tile from the wall. Decide what to keep. Discard one tile face-up and call its name.
pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed PUNG of 5-bams using a: Opponent exposed PUNG of 5-bams using a joker. It is your turn and you hold a real 5-bam. Swap?
Red (中), Green (發), and White Soap (白). White Soap also acts as the "zero" in some hands.
pendingTranslations.You hold the digit 0 (white dragon used: You hold the digit 0 (white dragon used as zero in Year hand). Pick the tile that represents 0.
pendingTranslations.It is your turn. You hold a real 7-crak;: It is your turn. You hold a real 7-crak; an opponent has a joker inside a pung of 7-craks. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Singles and Pairs hands forbid jokers en: Singles and Pairs hands forbid jokers entirely. A pair must always be two real, identical tiles.
pendingTranslations.We will email a verification link valid: We will email a verification link valid for 24 hours. You must verify before your first sign-in.
pendingTranslations.You have three 9-bams and need a fourth: You have three 9-bams and need a fourth for a kong. The pile has no real 9-bams. Which is LEGAL?
pendingTranslations.Five identical tiles. Requires at least: Five identical tiles. Requires at least 1 joker (only 4 real copies exist). High-value, high-risk.
pendingTranslations.Pung of 7-craks needs a third tile. Whic: Pung of 7-craks needs a third tile. Which is the BEST completion (real tile preferred over joker)?
pendingTranslations.You need a North wind to complete NEWS (: You need a North wind to complete NEWS (singles). Jokers cannot fill singles. Pick the legal tile.
pendingTranslations.Optional last step: each pair of players: Optional last step: each pair of players across may swap 0, 1, 2, or 3 x tiles by mutual agreement.
pendingTranslations.You hold a pair, someone discards the th: You hold a pair, someone discards the third — call "pung", expose all three face-up to the right.
pendingTranslations.Pass 3 left, 3 across, 3 right. Either C: Pass 3 left, 3 across, 3 right. Either Charleston can be stopped by unanimous agreement after across.
pendingTranslations.After exposing a pung, if you draw the 4: After exposing a pung, if you draw the 4th matching tile, promote the pung to a kong by sliding it in.
pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed QUINT of 8-dots (with t: Opponent exposed QUINT of 8-dots (with two jokers). It is your turn and you hold one real 8-dot. Swap?
pendingTranslations.A full simulated game vs. three AI playe: A full simulated game vs. three AI players. Same NMJL rules as multiplayer — no pressure, no ranking.
pendingTranslations.Mahjong beats kong beats pung. If two pl: Mahjong beats kong beats pung. If two players call the same discard for different groups, mahjong wins.
pendingTranslations.When your hand exactly matches a card li: When your hand exactly matches a card line — call "Mahjong" and expose the full hand for verification.
pendingTranslations.You need a third flower. The pile has no: You need a third flower. The pile has no real flowers. Which is a LEGAL completion of a kong of flowers?
pendingTranslations.It is your turn. You hold a real flower;: It is your turn. You hold a real flower; an opponent has a joker inside an exposed kong of flowers. Swap?
pendingTranslations.North, East, South, West. They appear in: North, East, South, West. They appear in winds-and-dragons hands and pair with their matching dragon color.
pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed KONG of red dragons con: Opponent exposed KONG of red dragons containing one joker. It is your turn and you hold a red dragon. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Inside any group of 3 or more identical: Inside any group of 3 or more identical tiles (pung, kong, quint, sextet) — yours or an opponent's exposure.
pendingTranslations.Only when your starting tiles already co: Only when your starting tiles already contain 5+ scoring pairs and you hold zero jokers. Otherwise pass on it.
pendingTranslations.Tiles printed in the same color must be: Tiles printed in the same color must be the same suit. Different colors mean different suits — always check.
pendingTranslations.25, 30, 35, 40, 50, 75 — printed on each: 25, 30, 35, 40, 50, 75 — printed on each line. Concealed hands double. Self-drawn winning tile doubles again.
The NMJL card groups hands by category. Each line shows tile patterns, suit requirements, and a value in points.
pendingTranslations.Impossible to complete any card line — u: Impossible to complete any card line — usually from over-exposing or losing a key tile. A dead hand cannot win.
pendingTranslations.Track at least two viable card lines unt: Track at least two viable card lines until you have committed multiple exposures. Watch the discards for blockers.
pendingTranslations.If you mahjong on a discard, the discard: If you mahjong on a discard, the discarder pays double. The other two pay the base. Self-draw: everyone pays double.
pendingTranslations.Once you expose, you are committed — you: Once you expose, you are committed — you must finish a hand line consistent with the exposure or risk a dead hand.
pendingTranslations.Tiles are color-coded: Bams (green), Cra: Tiles are color-coded: Bams (green), Craks (red), and Dots (blue/black). Watch the colors on the card — they match.
pendingTranslations.You hold a pair of 2-craks and need a th: You hold a pair of 2-craks and need a third for a pung. The pile has NO real 2-craks. Which tile is a LEGAL completion?
pendingTranslations.Pure singles and pairs — no pungs to lea: Pure singles and pairs — no pungs to lean on, no jokers allowed. The hardest section on the card, hence the top score.
Three suits of consecutive numbers (e.g., 1-2-3 bam, 4-5-6 crak, 7-8-9 dot). Suits must be different across the three runs.
Built from the current year's digits (e.g., 2-0-2-5). Often includes FFFF and NEWS. Refreshes every April with the new card.
pendingTranslations.Each year the card groups hands: 2024-20: Each year the card groups hands: 2024-2025, Year, 2468, Quints, Consecutive Run, 13579, Winds-Dragons, 369, Singles & Pairs.
pendingTranslations.Opponent has a joker in a SINGLE positio: Opponent has a joker in a SINGLE position of a Singles & Pairs hand. You hold the matching real tile and want to swap. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Easier hands score 25. Harder hands clim: Easier hands score 25. Harder hands climb to 30, 35, 40, 50, even 75 for Singles & Pairs. Concealed hands double their value.
pendingTranslations.Tiles that fit multiple lines (e.g. a si: Tiles that fit multiple lines (e.g. a single 5-bam slotting into 2024-Year and Consecutive Run) are pivot tiles — keep them.
pendingTranslations.Bams (Bamboos, green), Craks (Characters: Bams (Bamboos, green), Craks (Characters, red), and Dots (Circles, blue). Each suit runs 1 through 9, four copies of each tile.
pendingTranslations.You have two 4-craks and need a third fo: You have two 4-craks and need a third for a pung. Both a real 4-crak AND a joker are available. Pick the BEST (preferred) tile.
pendingTranslations.A joker is in YOUR own exposed pung. You: A joker is in YOUR own exposed pung. You want to take it back into your concealed hand without giving anything in exchange. Swap?
pendingTranslations.On your turn, if any player has a joker: On your turn, if any player has a joker exposed, you can give them the real tile it represents and take the joker into your hand.
pendingTranslations.Opponent exposed PUNG of green dragons w: Opponent exposed PUNG of green dragons with a joker. You hold a RED dragon (wrong color) and want to swap it for the joker. Swap?
Single digits = singles. Doubled = pair. Tripled = pung. Quadrupled = kong. The line "222 4444 6666 88" means pung-kong-kong-pair.
pendingTranslations.By the 8th draw, count tiles needed for: By the 8th draw, count tiles needed for your primary line. If 4+ are still needed and the wall is half gone, look at adjacent lines.
pendingTranslations.A tile that has not been seen and that f: A tile that has not been seen and that fits multiple visible exposures is the most dangerous. Hold it if you have a safe alternative.
pendingTranslations.A \"C\" badge means the hand must stay f: A "C" badge means the hand must stay fully concealed — no calls allowed. An "X" means you can expose pungs/kongs by calling discards.
pendingTranslations.You hold a pair of 2-craks and need a th: You hold a pair of 2-craks and need a third for a pung. No 2-craks are available — only the tiles below. Which is a LEGAL completion?
pendingTranslations.If a hand line allows exposures (X marke: If a hand line allows exposures (X marker) and you are missing only one or two tiles in a pung/kong, calling speeds you up dramatically.
pendingTranslations.You drew a joker from the wall this turn: You drew a joker from the wall this turn. You want to immediately swap it into an opponent's exposure for one of their real tiles. Swap?
pendingTranslations.8 jokers. After Charleston, on average 2: 8 jokers. After Charleston, on average 2 jokers reach each player. Track them — if 6 are exposed and you hold 1, only 1 remains hidden.
pendingTranslations.For any needed tile: 4 copies exist. Sub: For any needed tile: 4 copies exist. Subtract those visible (yours, exposed, discarded). What remains is in the wall or opponents' hands.
pendingTranslations.Pass 3 tiles right, 3 across, 3 left. Yo: Pass 3 tiles right, 3 across, 3 left. You may include up to 3 jokers... wait — never! Jokers stay home until after the deal is settled.
pendingTranslations.Concealed hands double their printed val: Concealed hands double their printed value. They are harder — you cannot call discards — but the payoff is worth it on flexible hands.
pendingTranslations.Eight flowers (interchangeable, gold acc: Eight flowers (interchangeable, gold accent) and eight jokers — wild for any group of 3+ identical tiles, but never for pairs or singles.
pendingTranslations.When an opponent exposes 222 craks, narr: When an opponent exposes 222 craks, narrow their possible hands to lines containing pung-of-2-craks. Discard tiles that can't complete those.
pendingTranslations.In the last 10 tiles of the wall, prefer: In the last 10 tiles of the wall, prefer discarding tiles already discarded — they can't be the winning tile (unless the caller already has 3).
pendingTranslations.It is your turn. Your own exposed kong o: It is your turn. Your own exposed kong of 3-craks contains a joker, and you hold a real 3-crak. You want to swap your real tile for that joker. Swap?
pendingTranslations.Any player may call the just-discarded t: Any player may call the just-discarded tile to complete a pung (3), kong (4), or quint (5). Calls jump the turn order — play resumes from the caller.
